title: Steeves Bujold Elected Vice President of the Canadian Bar Association
content:
## Steeves Bujold Elected Vice President of the Canadian Bar Association
McCarthy Tétrault congratulates Partner and Leader of the Litigation Group for Québec, Steeves Bujold on his appointment as Vice-President of the Canadian Bar Association (“CBA”).
This appointment recognizes Steeves’ ongoing commitment to access to justice and diversity and inclusion in the legal profession. As Vice-President, he will serve as a leader and advocate for the voices of Canada’s legal community.
Steeves will assume his Vice-President role in September of this year. Active in the organization and legal community, Steeves is also a member of the CBA’s Board of Directors (2019-2021), Chair of its Equality Subcommittee (2019-2020), Chair of the CEO Selection Committee and Chair of the Policy Committee (2020-2021).
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
Alley Adams Senior Manager, Communications 416-601-7928 aadams@mccarthy.ca
- Steeves Bujold, Ad. E. Partner | Chief Inclusion Officer People.Offices.Singular Montréal
